turn_response.narrative_text: 1-3 short paragraphs in second-person present tense. Separate paragraphs with a literal \n\n.
turn_response.set_current_inventory: Complete, updated inventory list (not a diff). Omit the field if inventory did not change.
turn_response.npc_changes: List of updates for existing NPCs whose state changed this turn.
turn_response.npc_introductions: List of newly introduced NPCs with full details. Omit the field if there are no new NPCs.

world_state_update.current_scene: Unique 1-5 word name of the player's immediate location.
world_state_update.current_date: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Date should reflect the date of events happening.
world_state_update.time_of_day: 24-hour HH:MM time of when events took place.
world_state_update.memory: Running summary of key events and important facts.
world_state_update.locations: List of all known locations in the story so far.

npc_update.name: NPC name to update.
npc_update.current_location: Current unique location name. Describes concrete room. Update only when changed. Should be precise. Avoid `her house`, instead do `{name}'s bathroom`

location.name: Unique location name. Describes concrete room. Update only when changed. Should be precise. Avoid `her house`, instead do `{surname}'s bathroom`
location.description: Very short description of how the location looks. Don't mention characters in room.
location.characters: List of characters currently in this location.
location.character: Character name present in this location.
location.available_items: List of items available to use or take in this location.
location.available_item: Item entry available at this location.

character.name: Full legal name.
character.gender: Character gender (male, female, futanari, intersex and so on).
character.general_description: General description for the character for a story or roleplaying game. It captures the subject's core identity and non-negotiable facts. The description includes basic traits like age, height, and physical build. It details their appearance, including hair, eyes, and typical attire. A full background covers their occupation, reputation, residence, and life timeline. Their psychology is defined by personality types, alignment, and internal beliefs. The description illustrates how they speak, move, and what they love or hate. It inventories their combat skills, weapons, and tactical style. Their professional mentality and ultimate life goal are clearly stated. Finally, it outlines any unique tools, abilities, or special mechanics they possess.
character.current_location: Current unique location name. Describes concrete room. Update only when changed. Should be precise. Avoid `her house`, instead do `{name}'s bathroom`
character.baseline_appearance: Precise objective surgical-style anatomical description of baseline physical state (full body only). Every body part mentioned once; exclude all temporary features. Max 1–3 sentences. Metric system exclusively. Always include height (cm), weight (kg), key bodily proportions. Male genitalia: erect length (cm), flaccid length (cm), circumcision status, testicle presence. Female genitalia: labia (e.g. neat/full/prominent inner lips), pubic hair (e.g. natural/trimmed/shaved).
character.current_clothing: Precise objective surgical-style exhaustive catalog of all current clothing layers (outerwear/underwear/accessories/medical dressings/bandages). Should contains only clothing description. Omit field entirely if unchanged; never output 'None'.
character.current_appearance: Precise objective surgical-style anatomical description of currently visible body parts only, excluding any areas covered by current_clothing. Update to reflect scene-specific temporary features (e.g., sweat, wounds, dirt, flush). Use metric system exclusively. Don't mention description of two different states at same time. It is very important to have same structure as baseline_appearance, only with covered parts omitted for correct work of diff.
character.current_activity: Concise, factual description of what the character is doing right now. Make sure to update even for background characters.

story_modules.track_npcs: Whether to track NPC state and updates.
story_modules.track_locations: Whether to track locations list and presence.
story_modules.character_appearance_clothing: Whether to include player appearance and clothing fields.
story_modules.character_personality_traits: Whether to include player personality traits.
story_modules.character_major_flaws: Whether to include player major flaws.
story_modules.npc_appearance_clothing: Whether to include NPC appearance and clothing fields.
story_modules.npc_personality_traits: Whether to include NPC personality traits.
story_modules.npc_major_flaws: Whether to include NPC major flaws.

story.title: 3-5 word title tied to the opening scenario.
story.opening_scenario: 1-3 short paragraphs in second-person present tense. Separate paragraphs with a literal `\n\n`.
story.starting_location: 1–5 word unique location name: specific named place, not generic. Use possessive/numbers if needed. No vague terms (unknown, adjacent, nearby).
story.starting_date: Starting date in YYYY-MM-DD format. It should be appropriate for time setting of the story.
story.starting_time: Starting time in 24h HH:MM format. It should be in line with opening of the story.
story.character_general_description: General description for the character for a story or roleplaying game. It captures the subject's core identity and non-negotiable facts. The description includes basic traits like age, height, and physical build. It details their appearance, including hair, eyes, and typical attire. A full background covers their occupation, reputation, residence, and life timeline. Their psychology is defined by personality types, alignment, and internal beliefs. The description illustrates how they speak, move, and what they love or hate. It inventories their combat skills, weapons, and tactical style. Their professional mentality and ultimate life goal are clearly stated. Finally, it outlines any unique tools, abilities, or special mechanics they possess.
story.pregen_npcs: List of pre-generated NPCs with full details. All named/identified characters appear with full names, no player/placeholders, add only if strongly implied, not at player's start unless stated.

requests.action_mode: Action mode: do, say, or story.

chat_next_speaker.speaker_member_id: Chat member ID to speak next.

create_story.character_data: Inline character data when not using character_id.

take_turn.request_id: Optional client request ID for idempotency.

traits.personality_traits: List of personality traits describing stable temperament and behavior. Each entry is a concise temperament or behavior descriptor of 1-8 words.
traits.major_flaws: List of major flaws describing significant, enduring weaknesses or liabilities. Each entry is a significant, enduring weakness or liability of 1-8 words.
traits.quirks: List of quirks describing small, idiosyncratic habits or mannerisms. Each entry is a small, specific habit or mannerism of 1-8 words.
traits.perks: List of perks describing practical advantages, talents, or resources. Each entry is a concrete advantage, talent, or resource of 1-8 words.
